published_crystallm_a_composition_only.source: Historical repository reports reproducing CrystaLLM Table 3; match@5/RMSE@5 not published in the source table.

reproduced_crystallm_a_composition_only.prompt_source: official CrystaLLM make_prompts.py without --with-spacegroup on official preprocessed test CIFs
